programme.title: Naked and Afraid: 21 Miles, 21 Days
programme.desc: In a lethal African hunting ground, a biker chick and a taxidermist have to stay on the move to survive. The pair must push across 21 miles of savannah to find food and water while avoiding a pride of lions that's tracking them every step of the way.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Argentina Impossible
programme.desc: A survival instructor teams up with a pediatrician to fight storms, cold and starvation in Argentina's Yungas Cloud Forest. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before hypothermia shuts them down.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: Really Close Encounters
programme.desc: Is there life in outer space? Rob Riggle is on the case and heads to the Nevada desert, a UFO hotspot. He meets with an ex-CIA agent, Air Force pilots, a professional UFO hunter and a team of investigators.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: The Mysterious Disappearance of The Lost Legion
programme.desc: Rob must find out what happened to Rome's 9th Legion, which vanished into thin air. He meets with military historians and archaeologists as he searches through muddy bogs, analyzes ancient skulls and learns about Roman ghosts.

programme.title: Railroad Alaska: Frozen Danger
programme.desc: An avalanche hits and blocks the track, delaying brakemen Danny Forsman and Lynn 'Animal' Reitz making a crucial delivery of snow removal equipment to Anchorage.

programme.title: Railroad Alaska: Killer Ice
programme.desc: When ice threatens to shut down the rails, pregnant off-gridder Amanda Simpson is left stranded while her friend seeks out supplies.

programme.title: Railroad Alaska: The Beast
programme.desc: A devastating snowstorm blocks Alaska's lifeline. Danny and Animal bring out a 67-ton snowplow and race to clear the way for a freight train hauling vital diesel to Seward. Also Mary and Clyde need an emergency generator.

programme.title: Railroad Alaska: Disaster Trail
programme.desc: Off the grid brothers, Steven and Jonathon, must fix a collapsing roof on their cabin before a life-threatening snowstorm. Brakemen, Danny and Animal, race to deliver military equipment to Anchorage when a car derails.

programme.title: Railroad Alaska: Ice Dagger
programme.desc: Hugh Evans finds a broken rail switch that threatens to derail a train and stop crucial medical supplies from getting through to homesteaders, Clyde and Mary Lovel, and Roadmaster Bruce must shoot down a twenty-ton icicle before it hits a train.

programme.title: Railroad Alaska: Spring Attacks
programme.desc: With the spring thaw comes floodwater that threatens to wash away a section of track that Roadmaster Bruce must race to repair. The spring also means bears, which pose a danger to settlers Jim and Nancy as they make their way to the passenger train.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Outback Gold
programme.desc: As the Yukon freezes, Parker Schnabel sets his sights on buying a gold-rich claim in Australia. With the help of third-generation Aussie prospector, Tyler Mahoney, Parker takes his team Down Under in search of ground he can mine year-round.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Welcome Stranger
programme.desc: Tempted by the largest nuggets he's ever seen, Parker ventures deep into an underground mine. Tyler tracks down a trommel for the team, and a local miner lets the team test a claim that yields more gold per yard than Parker's ever seen in the Yukon.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Tyler's Trial
programme.desc: In the legendary Palmer goldfields, Parker and his team encounter a lucrative family-run mining operation and discover dirt far richer than anything they've ever seen in the Yukon. But convincing the family to lease him virgin ground will come at a price.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: Parker tests virgin ground on the Fitzgerald claim and makes a big discovery, but he must gain the trust of the family if he wants to strike a deal.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hell's Crack
programme.desc: Parker and his team face a treacherous river, extreme heat, and machine breakdowns for a shot at $100 million in gold at Hell's Crack.

programme.title: Unexpected: What's in a Name
programme.desc: McKayla's baby's name is met with lots of tears. Shayden struggles with Kelsey's rules and Lexus feels her mom is pushing her away. Lilly gets more than she bargained for when she tries to induce labor. Caelen surprises McKayla with a bold proposition.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Aaron's Story
programme.desc: Since the death of his mother, Aaron has lived at home to care for his aging father. But due to his food addiction, Aaron has to heavily rely on his father for help instead. Now, Aaron must learn to care for himself to avoid eating himself to death.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Dominic's Story
programme.desc: Dominic's life is falling apart due to his food addiction. At over 600-lbs, living in a van with his brother, Dominic decides to leave California for Texas, where only Dr. Now can help him learn to face life's challenges without using food to cope.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Where Are They Now: Yami

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Somewhere in There Is a Foot

programme.title: Little People, Big World: A New House Hang

programme.title: Long Lost Family: The First and Last Time I Saw My Sister
programme.desc: Chris tries to unravel a legal mystery involving a woman's sister whom she last saw across a New York courtroom thirty years ago.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Nothing Short of a Miracle
programme.desc: A tough Texas lawman seeks Lisa's help to tackle a long unsolvable, personal investigation: the story of his own birth and adoption.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Switched in the Hospital

programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo talk about people who are so soft they're known as the delicates, meet some birds that are best described as winged weirdos, and hang out with some disgusting couples in their honeymoon phase.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Barnes
programme.desc: NBA Superstar Matt Barnes joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel as they mock some "Floppers," laugh at the uncoordinated in "Zero Sport Athletes," and call an ambulance for people who can't handle their weed in "Can't-abis."

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tiana and James
programme.desc: After a three year online relationship, Tiana moved across the country to finally be with the love of her life, James, and reveal her secret in person. But now that they are in the same state, James seems more elusive than ever.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Gemini and Myranda
programme.desc: After seven-years of hot drama, Gemini is desperate to find Myranda. But the script flips when Nev and Kamie end up being the ones reaching out for help, as they stage their first intervention ever for an infamous repeat catfish!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Paris and Tara
programme.desc: Paris enlists Nev and Max to help her figure out who has been catfishing her for the past four years. As the guys investigate, they make a shocking discovery that casts suspicion onto Paris herself.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Johnny and Connor
programme.desc: Nev and Max are recruited by Jonathon after his online romantic interest disappears for a month. When the guys realize a former catfish is involved, they begin to question Jonathon's sincerity.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Craig and Zoe
programme.desc: When Craig first met Zoe on Facebook, everything was great. But things turned sour when she began demanding his online passwords and hacking into his accounts.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Infiniti and Dave
programme.desc: 19-year-old dancer Infiniti wants Nev and Max to help her find out if her online love is real. What the pair uncover is far shadier than either of them had ever imagined.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Felicia
programme.desc: Young couples take their online-only romantic relationships offline and meet in person.

programme.title: Movie: Titanic

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Toast the Competition

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Asia, Africa And India

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Passport of Flavor

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island and Desert

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pied to Fried
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's travelling the nation and digging into all kinds of killer grub. In St. Petersburg, Florida, a lights-out spot is loading up the righteous ramen, and a New Orleans smokehouse puts out Big Easy favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Spicy to Icy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's heating up with some spice and cooling off with some ice. In Palm Springs, Calif., a barbecue joint pilin' up the meats and firin' up their 'flamethrower.'

programme.desc: A giant crocodile goes head to head with a giant anaconda. The town sheriff must find a way to destroy the two monsters before they kill the whole town.

programme.title: Movie: Lake Placid: Legacy

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mirror Image

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Monsters Are Due on Maple Street

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Sex, Lies and Larvae
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate a bug-riddled body found in the desert. Warrick and Catherine look into the theft of some art. Nick gets to find out why a missing woman's car is found at the bus station. Warrick is suspected of having gambled on duty.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: I-15 Murders
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a supermarket. In the store, Grissom finds a bathroom stall door that claims five women have been killed. Warrick is caught in a casino on duty and is paired with a reluctant Sara.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Fahrenheit 932
programme.desc: A man convicted of arson and the murder of his wife and child seeks assistance from Grissom to help prove his innocence. Meanwhile, Catherine and Nick investigate the underground world of sports gambling when a teenager is murdered at close range.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Boom
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in a building killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making. Nick's prostitute friend is found dead the morning after a night of passion.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: To Halve and to Hold
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine must cover miles of territory to find the rest of a skeleton when a single human bone is discovered in the desert. Warrick and Sara trace the death of a male stripper to members of a wedding party.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Table Stakes
programme.desc: The team examines a corpse found floating in a pool; Warrick investigates a mob hit.

programme.title: Movie: Deep Blue Sea 2
programme.desc: A group of scientists are targeted by bio-engineered bull sharks.

programme.title: Movie: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
programme.desc: A giant crocodile goes head to head with a giant anaconda. The town sheriff must find a way to destroy the two monsters before they kill the whole town.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Century-old Farmhouse Becomes New Forever Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny help a couple update their century-old farmhouse so that it better accommodates large family gatherings. Their main goal is to improve flow and add modern amenities without stripping the home of its unique country character.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: House of Hidden Horrors
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina head to La Habra, California to check out an enticing off-market listing. The home is typical for the area and appears to need only cosmetic updating.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Of Wreck and Ruin
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a home that's for sale by its owner in La Puente, California. It's in rough shape to say the least and because it's tenant occupied, they can't look inside.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Ready-to-Flip Ranch
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by an owner in Anaheim, California, looking to sell their three bedroom, two bathroom home. These kind of houses are quick and easy to flip, exactly what the duo are looking for.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Diving Into a Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina buy a large home in Anaheim, California, with some strange additions that could end up costing them thousands of dollars and sacrificing square footage.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Infested Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina land on a small three-bedroom, two-bathroom home that needs a lot of work in Santa Ana, California. While deciding how to rehab the home, they clash over style so decide to compete to see who has the better design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Additional Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a house in Long Beach, CA, with tons of potential. To justify their investment, they decide to add a bedroom and bath.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Flipping Family Nightmare
programme.desc: Junes and his mom share a dream of building a family flipping business, but this flip in Long Beach is quickly becoming a nightmare. Blaming each other for mistakes and losing money, they disagree on who should be doing what.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Dancing With Disaster
programme.desc: Patricia and Legacy are professional dancers turned house flippers and a high-end project in Brentwood has them seeing dollar signs. Their hideously expensive loan and a major foundation problem threaten to ruin this flip from the start.

programme.title: House Hunters: A Grown-up Home in Chicago
programme.desc: It's the second marriage for this Chicago couple, and their first home purchase together. She wants high-rise living with all the amenities that come with it. He thinks it's time to grow up and would prefer a single-family home.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Happy Kids in The Hague
programme.desc: A Seattle couple decides to move to the Netherlands to raise their kids, and they both love The Hague's biking culture. However, he wants an easy bike commute near the city center, but she wants a home on the outskirts with a yard.

programme.title: House Hunters: Mother Knows Best in Virginia
programme.desc: An officer in the Air Force is on his way to a new assignment in Hampton, Virginia, and he's set on buying a big, move-in-ready home. However, his mom has come along to gently push him towards a fixer-upper that won't break the bank.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Leveling Up in Malmo
programme.desc: An American couple struggling with their work-life balance head to Malmo, Sweden, for a slower pace. He'll need to take a pay cut in order to move, and she won't be able to work, so the reality of purchasing a home becomes stressful.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Abandoned Flip

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cracked Flip

programme.desc: A young family of five looks to put down roots in Florida by building their forever home on a 2-acre lot. Brian and Mika mix modern touches with rustic, farmhouse charm to create a dream home the family can enjoy for years to come.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Evil Places
programme.desc: For thousands of years, there have been places around the world considered dangerous to humans. Look at whether these places may have alien connections.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Greys
programme.desc: Beings with big heads and giant eyes are known by researchers as the 'greys.' They have been depicted in art and carved in stone figures. Who they are, what planet they come from, and what they want are all examined.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Some Ancient Astronaut Theorists believe the Great Flood really happened, and that aliens saved humanity from extinction. Furthermore, that celestial beings are poised to save us again when another catastrophe sweeps across the Earth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mysterious Nine
programme.desc: Stories of emperors, kings and pharaohs consulting a pantheon of nine gods can be found in virtually every culture across the globe. Sessions conducted by CIA scientists connected with a group of entities called 'The Nine' who influence events on earth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Sentinels
programme.desc: Seven stone giants stand guard over a Pacific island, but no one knows what they are protecting. Later, Girogio and David explore a Polynesian land of bizarre figures and forbidden places in search of evidence of mankind's extraterrestrial origins.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Element 115
programme.desc: An exotic heavy element may provide the key to humanity's future in the stars. According to physicist Bob Lazar, 'element 115' is the fuel source for an alien spacecraft he was hired to reverse-engineer by the U.S. government.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Infection
programme.desc: In 2016, scientists made the astonishing discovery that 30 percent of all protein adaptations since humans' divergence with chimpanzees have been driven by viruses.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mission
programme.desc: Ancient Sumerian tablets describe an alien race, known as the Anunnaki, who came to Earth to mine for gold. Egyptian hieroglyphs depict hybrid creatures that were part man, part animal.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Visitors
programme.desc: The Dogone people possess knowledge of a galaxy they claim was given to them by a star god named Amma. The Hopi and Zuni people celebrate Kachinas, gods from the sky, whose headdresses and costumes appear to resemble modern helmets.

programme.title: Movie: Mildred Pierce

programme.title: Movie: Our Miss Brooks
programme.desc: A high school teacher has to rescue the professor she loves from his grasping mother.

programme.title: Movie: Network
programme.desc: Media madness reigns supreme in this scathing satire about the uses and abuses of network television. The story centres on Diana Christiansen, the ratings-hungry programming executive who is prepared to do anything for better numbers.

programme.title: Movie: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Things go awry when a man tries to rob a bank to pay for his lover's sex change operation.

programme.title: Movie: Across 110th Street
programme.desc: The Mafia hunts down three men who robbed a mob-controlled bank while impersonating the police.

programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores. Police release surveillance footage to the press and ask the public for help to find a duffle bag wielding murderer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Other Zodiac

programme.title: Snapped: Kayla Nelson
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a devoted father leads Arkansas police to a shocking crime scene, the search for answers reveals gang threats, and a killer that's willing to go to great lengths to escape justice.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Other Zodiac
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs. Police race against time before he can achieve twelve killings to complete the Zodiac.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Spiritual Warriors
programme.desc: After three obedient followers die during an intense sweat lodge ceremony put on by a prominent self-help guru, police must determine if their deaths were accidental, or did the guru push the participants too far.

programme.title: Snapped: Lisa Jones-Orock

programme.title: Snapped: Sharon Halstead
programme.desc: When a young mother is executed and her family critically injured, investigators piece together haunting clues and an earlier murder to capture deranged killers with a spiritual calling.

programme.title: Snapped: Shaunna Dodd
programme.desc: A deadly home invasion leads to questions about a popular bartender, illegal drugs and the murder of her husband.

programme.desc: When a young mother set out for a morning jog and never returned, police found a tiny clue buried in a home computer that could unlock the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: The Player
programme.desc: The story of a double murder with no witnesses and few clues.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Somebody’s Daughter
programme.desc: Detectives often hit dead ends that can stop them cold but, for one young detective, dead ends were just another place to start. She'd beaten the odds in her own life. Now, she was determined to beat them on the job using her head and her heart.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Secret
programme.desc: Was a man missing or was he hiding; on the surface it didn't make sense: he had a wife, a good job, a daughter he loved. Investigators were told he also had a secret and they went on an undercover mission to find the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: She was beautiful, trusting and troubled. The young woman from a prominent family was just turning it around and realizing her promise. Then she vanished. When the police seemed unable to find her, her family hatched a plan to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Blind Justice
programme.desc: For investigators, motive can be the hardest thing to find. This crime took place in Florida but detectives didn't discover a motive for murder until they looked into a tropical island thousands of miles away, where a festering grudge was born.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Great Escape

programme.title: American Monster: An Open Relationship
programme.desc: Brent Cotta's popular wife, Cassie, has mysteriously disappeared on New Year's Eve in Fort Smith, Arkansas. When family and friends conduct a search, the discovery of a shallow grave soon leads to the horrific truth emerging.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: While I Was Gone
programme.desc: Michele Ward was always glad that her husband, Richard Daniel Starrett, didn't mind her frequent trips to visit her parents. She never guessed that he sent her away because his sick perversion was getting harder and harder to hide.

programme.title: Dead of Night: I Know What Happened to That Girl
programme.desc: A young college student vanishes quietly into the darkness. Months later a shocking discovery is made, and the residents of the small town begin to question those they once believed were innocent. Before long, the truth will rise from the dead of night.

programme.title: Dead of Night: He Shouldn't Be With Us
programme.desc: A woman's attempt to flee a troubled relationship leads to her demise. Police discover a haunting message left behind, but the case goes cold for years until a prime suspect's macabre desire for blood is revealed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Second Best
programme.desc: Being the 'other woman' is a lonely life. Some turn rejection into rage. A call girl craved the high life, a teen mom eradicated her rival, and a lesbian love affair ripped a family apart. These Deadly Women refused to play 'Second Best'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Turns to Hate
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion but so is hate.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Beauty and the Beastly
programme.desc: Sometimes beauty can mask the ugliest of truths.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Blame Game
programme.desc: Some women can't admit their failings. They point the finger of blame at others.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Scorned
programme.desc: Love brings hope and happiness, but broken hearts can leave a trail of blood and tears. When lovers and friends dump these women, they take the ultimate revenge. These Deadly Women prove hell hath no fury like a woman 'Scorned.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Brutal Bride
programme.desc: A prim Californian woman chooses to commit a deadly sin rather than live with an immoral husband, a bustling housewife whips up a recipe for riches and greed drives two women to join a murderous poison ring.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Never Too Young
programme.desc: Youth is no drawback to being a cold-hearted killer. For some young women taking a life is merely child's play. These twisted girls proved you're 'Never Too Young' to be Deadly Women.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Never Too Old
programme.desc: They look like sweet grannies but they prove murder has no age limit. A grandma's need to control her grandson takes a deadly turn; a retirement home romance meets a lethal end; and an ageing gold-digger preys on her final victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Payback
programme.desc: When these women have scores to settle, they take matters into their own hands. A traumatized woman thinks she's an avenging angel; one of Mexico's most infamous serial killers targets the elderly; and a man is butchered by two women he tries to help.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Murder for Me
programme.desc: Some women like others to do their dirty work. A drama queen brings her love triangle to a permanent end; an intimate betrayal turns friends into deadly foes; and a loose woman will do anything to protect her freedom.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Loveless
programme.desc: There are many ways to leave your lover one of those ways is dead.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool
programme.desc: Vic and Yukari had to leave their beloved pool behind when they moved into a California community. Brian and Paul must create an epic pool in the couple's new, small space, and the design includes an exposed acrylic wall holding back water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Modern Mountain Pool
programme.desc: A family enhances their spectacular mountain view with a breathtaking oversized pool featuring an infinity edge. An outdoor kitchen and firepit complete the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Broken to Beautiful
programme.desc: After living with a broken pool for four years, a family decides to build their dream pool again. Brian and Paul Porter give them an out-of-this-world creation, featuring a waterfall wall, sunken fire pit and poolside spa.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Perfect Time for a Pool and Backyard Oasis

programme.title: Pool Kings: Making a Splash in Arizona

programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.desc: Lucas builds a giant pool for a dear friend-turned client. Lucas creates a dream backyard with a dock, cascading waterfalls a fire pit and audio/visual entertainment swim-up bar.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Looking Out for Lava Tubes in Kona
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are on the hunt to find an empty lot with great ocean views. They want to build a spec home on the property that they can turn around and sell in the coming year.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Skylight to the Stars and a Stunning Free-Form Lanai
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler build a brand new house in an upcountry area of the Big Island. Skylights are placed throughout the home, including a giant one in the master bedroom that will allow the homeowners to sleep under the stars.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Flipping a 1970s Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: West Hills, CA, newlyweds are eager to buy their first home together. He's a second-generation real estate agent so they feel confident they have the skills to lock in the perfect house.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: A Renovation Surprise
programme.desc: Midwestern transplants are leaving their Burbank, California rental for more space and a better commute. They find a home, move in and begin a huge renovation, only to find out they're expecting.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Florida Engagement Renovation
programme.desc: Newly engaged couple Missy and Devon are looking to purchase their first home together in Ormond-by-the-Sea, Florida. With their wedding months away, the project threatens to be too much for the young couple to handle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Life Changers
programme.desc: We're revealing all the unforgettable dishes that changed our lives.

programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Deep Freeze
programme.desc: These frozen treats go far beyond vanilla, chocolate and strawberry scoots. In Honolulu, Shimazu Store pushes the boundaries of shave ice, a uniquely Hawaiian treat. In New York, Ice and Vice uses unconventional ingredients to create edgy desserts.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Game Changers

programme.title: Unique Sweets: L.A. Sweets
programme.desc: We've got the fried, the frozen, and the fabulous! It's a tour of the sweetest spots in Los Angeles. At Republique, French pastries are expertly crafted, and totally addictive.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Start
programme.desc: At Holy Donut in Portland, Maine, the dough for their Maine blueberry donuts and sweet potato ginger glazed donuts includes mashed potatoes.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Surprise Filled Cakes

programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Close Encounters of a Pug Kind/ History Mystery
programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sea Captain Mickey
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake’s sonar-detecting machine discovers that there’s something big at the bottom of Mickey Lake, Mickey and the gang hop into the Clubhouse Submarine and set out to find the 'Big Something'.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Pirate Adventure
programme.desc: Mickey and pals are enjoying a day at the beach when Peg Leg Pete delivers a note from Goofy's long lost Grandpappy, Captain Goof-Beard, asking for the gang's help in ensuring that Harmony-Chord Island doesn't go out of tune and sink.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Ducks
programme.desc: Donald volunteers to help a group of ducks get to a warm beach for their winter retreat.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Fishy Story
programme.desc: Mickey and crew journey to a waterfall to find Daisy's pet goldfish.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pete's Beach Blanket Luau
programme.desc: It's the hottest day of the year and Pete decides to put on a Luau down at the lake.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and Minnie's Jungle Safari
programme.desc: Minnie is determined to snap a photo of the Hula Hibiscus that only blooms once a year.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey Goes Fishing
programme.desc: Goofy drops off his kitten, Mr. Pettibone, at the Clubhouse to Mickey for the day.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Tree House/ Saving Simon
programme.desc: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they made it their home. Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to stop his departure and keep him at home.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Chin Up/ Dogs Day Afternoon

programme.title: Fairly OddParents

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Master of Horror
programme.desc: With New Orleans decorated for Halloween, the team investigates the murder of a naval staff Judge Advocate found in a cemetery dressed in a Victorian costume with vampiric puncture wounds on her neck. Meanwhile, the team debates Halloween night activity.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Watch Over Me
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a navy officer with the highest level top secret clearance who was recently assigned as a tech liaison with a private developer. Also, Pride transforms the carport into an auto shop.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: How Much Pain Can You Take?
programme.desc: To send a message to Pride, Baitfish murders someone close to the NCIS team, prompting a citywide manhunt for the elusive criminal.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Touched by the Sun

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: I Do

programme.title: Movie: Dirty Teacher
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers her teacher is seducing her boyfriend, events turn deadly after the teacher tries to cover it up.

programme.title: Movie: Lethal Seduction
programme.desc: A mother must fight to protect her son from the delusional romantic advances of an older, predatory woman who has become obsessed with him.

programme.title: Movie: Sinister Seduction
programme.desc: A recent widow is concerned for her son until he makes a new friend, but she becomes suspicious of his intentions as time goes on. As his obsession becomes more dangerous, she discovers his advances are much more sinister than she thought.

programme.title: Movie: Til Ex Do Us Part
programme.desc: After being accused of assaulting her husband's 'friend,' a woman finds herself being framed by the other, who has been engineering a series of attacks against herself in order to steal her husband.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Three women a day are killed by a former or current husband or boyfriend. Nicole Beverly is desperately trying to avoid that fate. Chris Cuomo goes inside the epidemic of intimate partner violence that turns lethal for so many women.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Doctor Love
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo unravels the twisted tale of what happened to a woman who thought she found the perfect man while online dating, until the promising love story went horribly wrong and somebody ended up dead.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Blade of Betrayal
programme.desc: When a wealthy New York woman is found brutally murdered her home, detectives learn that her family isn’t as picture perfect as they seem.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie

programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Trouble Shoot
programme.desc: Find out why Murr is particular about the way labels face in grocery stores, how Sal always gets Joe to break character and who works out with a personal trainer.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The C-Team
programme.desc: Station 24 is forced to work with the buff and handsome C-Team and their new transfer Delilah. Terry buys a gas-guzzling truck and Eddie takes him for a ride.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: The C-Team
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No. Holds. Barred
programme.desc: It's getting hot and heavy as powerlifting besties battle a couple whose on and off status is ever evolving.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Fighting Back the Tears
programme.desc: Gym-loving ladies power through the pain while bartending besties try to knock back the heat. The fight for $25,000 is not easy. Friendships will strain, people will cry, and stomachs will be destroyed in the pepperdome.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Where's the Bathroom?
programme.desc: Pete Lee reveals how millennials cure glaucoma, Michelle Buteau becomes a guidance counselor, and Matthew Broussard unmasks a German techno DJ in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Russian Interference
programme.desc: Gina Yashere obsesses over the contents of a crowd member's pants, Joel Kim Booster knows exactly what not to say as a Pilates teacher, and Dave Hill tries a unique style of crowd work.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Let the Record Show
programme.desc: Adam Ray steps out of a time machine, Brad Williams almost makes his head explode in a rant about airplanes, and Sarah Tiana reveals how Brad gets a waiter's attention.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Actually Quite Wholesome
programme.desc: Find out what Yamaneika Saunders does on blind dates, what bizarre get-rich-quick schemes Julian McCullough has up his sleeve, and how Jessimae Peluso brings Yamaneika to tears from laughter.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hacking the Home and Beyond

programme.desc: An undercover police officer infiltrates an L.A. street gang in order to crack a hijacking ring.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Whole Lotta Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into hearty helpings of comfort starting with a soul food spot dishing out Southern seafood and killer fried chicken in Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast, West Coast
programme.desc: Guy visits a California joint to try spicy pork and knockout gnocchi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Flavortown Comes Home
programme.desc: With restaurant takeout and delivery taking over the nation, on this trip, Guy is hosting a virtual Triple-D family reunion, bringing 'Flavortown' to his own kitchen. Guy checks in with four DDD alumns who walk Guy through their signature recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Meat and Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into mega meat and a little bit of sweet. In Atlanta, a Korean-taqueria mashing up unique flavors in their chicken tacos and bulgogi fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lots of Latin
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is loading up on all kinds of Latin on this trip. In Logan, Utah, a Salvadoran spot puttin' out pupusas and a cabeza creation. A funky food truck in Denver dishing out prime-time Puerto Rican specialties. And in Burlington, Vt.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: British, Hawaiian and Mexican
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub from all around the globe! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a true British pub serving authentic English staples from fish and chips to Yorkshire pudding.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cosmopolitan Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing all kinds of cosmopolitan comfort food. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, a righteous joint puts a New England spin on corned beef and cabbage, plus a fresh take on stroganoff.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Typical Joints
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's going off the beaten path to check out some funky finds. In Charlotte, N.C., an eatery tucked inside a beer store slings crazy waffle creations. In Houston, a not-your-everyday fusion joint mashes up killer barbecue with sushi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Home Delivery
programme.desc: Guy meets virtually with four chefs who walk him through one of their dishes with ingredients they've sent him. In this episode there's primo pork from New Hampshire, California chicken parm, Minneapolis pizza and tuna all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tasty Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into dishes steeped in tasty tradition. In Seattle, a funky spot makes their name with scratch-made Russian piroshki. A tucked-away joint in Kona serves up a bite of culture with their authentic Hawaiian cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Mouthfuls
programme.desc: Guy's unhinging his jaw for some mega mouthfuls! In Robbinsville, New Jersey, a real-deal Italian market cookin' up prosciutto bread and their multi-meat 'boss of the sauce'.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Full of Surprises
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into some surprising ingredients. In Santa Fe, N.M., a culinary pub serving up lights-out lamb neck and frying up tamales. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky tapas joint dishin' out duck tongue tacos and braised pork jowl.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: On the Hook and in the Bun
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in off-the-hook seafood and digging into some serious sandwiches on this trip. In Seattle, a beer-lover's spot serving fantastic fish and chips and the bomb beef dip. On the big island of Hawaii, a local gem dishin' out fresh-catches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coming Together in Cali
programme.desc: For this trip, Guy Fieri zeroes in on Chico, California, celebrating the town's food scene as residents and restaurant owners recover from ravaging fires that rocked the area.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Home Delivery
programme.desc: Guy meets virtually with four chefs who walk him through one of their dishes with ingredients they've sent him. In this episode there's primo pork from New Hampshire, California chicken parm, Minneapolis pizza and tuna all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hitting the Grill
programme.desc: Guy samples foods straight off the grill, including a burger joint in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Passin' the Baton
programme.desc: Guy's hitting' the road and chowin' down on some long standing traditions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multitaskers
programme.desc: A Greek diner is decked out in neon and servin' up family recipes like Yia Yia's grape leaves. In Oxnard, Calif., the jack of all trades joint is baking, brewing and cooking all in the same restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Gettin' Fresh
programme.desc: In Boulder, Colo., a college town favourite since the 1920s is flipping grass-fed beef burgers. And, in Chicago, a family-run restaurant puts a twist on biscuits and gravy - with free-range duck.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sweet 'n Savory
programme.desc: Guy discovers homemade banana cream pie in Minnesota.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to Tampa Bay for authentic Mexican street food served out of a bus. In Virginia Beach, he has dinner at a popular seafood joint, and in San Antonio he visits a breakfast joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Only at This Joint
programme.desc: A BBQ place in Portland serving smoking trout and Oysters Rockefeller in Florida.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pork and Paprikash
programme.desc: Guy finds a diner spicing, roasting and smoking fresh pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Guy travels to places where things are still done the old-fashioned way. In Oklahoma City, a steak house has been serving the same menu items for more than 80 years.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Breakfast for Dinner, South of the Border
programme.desc: Rachael shows that breakfast for dinner doesn't have to mean pancakes and scrambled eggs. She whips up crave-worthy chilaquiles with a rich, red chile sauce made with Guajillo peppers for a satisfying kick.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: A Picture Worth Eating
programme.desc: Valerie invites photographer Brian Bowen Smith over for a menu inspired by his favorite ingredient, tequila. Tequila lime chicken wings, chayote slaw, chile lime party mix, a mango tart and mango tequila sunrise are served.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Kitchen Cantina
programme.desc: The Kitchen is celebrating Cinco De Mayo with a menu full of dishes inspired by Mexican drinks. Sunny Anderson cooks up Michelada Steak Tacos with Cerveza Pico, and then Jeff Mauro and Geoffrey Zakarian share two new ways to top tacos.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Spicy Kitchen
programme.desc: After chowing down on some delicious but fiery hot chicken from Prince's Hot Chicken Shack, Trisha and her friend Julie make some spicy specialties, including chipotle peanuts and South tex-mex rice.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Taco Night Twist
programme.desc: Molly Yeh treats her girlfriends to a taco night done Pizza Friday style. Her menu includes taco pizza Al Pastor with tomatillo salsa and avocado cucumber salad served alongside watermelon agua fresca.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 3
programme.desc: Ree and her family film a mix of easy quarantine recipes and fun outtakes. Ree puts a spin on pantry, fridge and freezer staples with her hash brown tostadas and fancy grilled PB&J, a mashup of two favourites.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh Boy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking for her permanently hungry teenage sons. First, she makes buffalo chicken totchos that are a blend of potato tots, nachos and wings.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quarantine Edition: Leftover Takeover
programme.desc: The Kitchen is sharing amazing ways to transform leftovers with brand-new ideas plus delicious inspiration from viewers on social media. Sunny Anderson hits the grill with leftover marinara sauce and makes easy bacon and egg breakfast pizza.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Heating Up with Jason Isbell and Amanda Shires
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is a huge fan of husband and wife singer-songwriters Jason Isbell and Amanda Shires. True to southern hospitality, Trisha invites them over for a delicious meal with an added kick.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Cheese Please
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to cook at the ranch with one request: make it with cheese, please. Aaron May makes banana and blue cheese crostadas and haloumi French fries and Aarti Sequeira creates Egyptian spinach pie.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Part 1
programme.desc: Sixteen chefs who have mastered and won Guy's Grocery Games are back to compete in an epic five-week event: The Supermarket Masters Tournament. Four amazing GGG winners kick things off by making an upscale dinner that turns into an uphill battle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Part 2
programme.desc: The Supermarket Masters Tournament continues as four more GGG winners compete for a guaranteed $10,000 and a shot at winning up to $25,000 more in the finale. First, the chefs have to serve up a plate of hometown comfort.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Part 3
programme.desc: Four more GGG winners are ready to master the store in part three of the Supermarket Masters Tournament. First, they must make a steakhouse dinner, even though the meat and seafood sections of the market are unexpectedly closed.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Part 4
programme.desc: Four past GGG winners are vying for an instant $10,000 and the last spot in the Supermarket Masters Tournament finale. First, they must make a high-end, old-school dinner that includes the mish-mash of ingredients on Guy's Grocery List.

programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne decide to let Darlene go to art school in Chicago, but will Darlene leave David to pursue her future? Meanwhile, at a birthday party, 'Seven Minutes in Heaven' turns DJ into a new man.

programme.title: River Monsters: Man-Eating Monster

programme.desc: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos sank on the Amazon, many rumoured to have been eaten alive. Jeremy retraces the doomed boat's last voyage and faces adversaries as he tries to uncover what was being the Amazon Apocalypse.

programme.desc: Jeremy investigates the rivers and lakes of Canada in search of a reported 20-foot monster.

programme.desc: When a sea monster washes up on an English beach, Jeremy Wade sets off to unmask the beast. His journey will take him to the ice sheets of Greenland and the fjords of Norway, where he races against the Arctic storm threatening to end his quest.

programme.title: River Monsters: American Killers

programme.desc: Wayde and Brett take on one of the most popular hotels in the world: The Bellagio Hotel and Casino. Five times a year the Bellagio performs a massive makeover to their conservatory, and this year they want to add two giant aquariums.

programme.title: Tanked!: Thumbs Up!
programme.desc: The Thumb is not your ordinary gas station, this one stop shop even sells BBQs and their renovation just won't be complete without a custom fish tank. Wayde and Brett are ready for dessert when Las Vegas' own Donut Bar calls with a plan for a tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Internet Tank Sensation

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Mystery on the Mountain
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey investigate the 2012 disappearance of a young father who traveled to Idaho to attend a family reunion, but never showed up. As the list of suspects grows, can the team uncover the truth behind his vanishing?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Double Life Discovered
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny investigate one of their oldest cases ever, the brutal 1984 murder of an elderly storeowner known for having a wife with a violent temper. Was his death the robbery gone wrong it appeared to be, or a plot of his wife's design?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Digging for Answers
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve head to Oregon to help solve the 1993 murder of a young man allegedly shot and buried by a group of dangerous criminals. They'll need to pit them against each other to crack the case and finally bring justice to his family.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Deadly Affairs
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve investigate the 2016 homicide of a hard-working mother who was strangled to death and dumped in a ditch. Was it a random act of violence, or did her strained marriage factor in to her murder?

programme.title: Movie: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Legendary showman P.T. Barnum launches his iconic and legendary circus and museum, assembling a collection of performers, oddities, animals and outcasts to create the greatest show on Earth, succeeding despite countless doubters and setbacks.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hardly Kirk-ing
programme.desc: Bart and Milhouse explore the perks of being an adult when a shaving experiment leaves Milhouse looking exactly like his father.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gorgeous Grampa
programme.desc: Homer's obsession with the TV show 'Storage Battles' leads the family to discover Grampa's past identity as 'Gorgeous Godfrey,' the most feared, villainous man in pro-wrestling history.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Black-Eyed, Please
programme.desc: Flanders becomes jealous when his laid-back parents start to prefer Homer's company over his and he faces unbearable guilt after punching Homer in the eye, as he desperately tries to reconcile with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: What Animated Women Want
programme.desc: Once again, Homer must save his marriage when Marge gets fed up with his behavior. Meanwhile, after watching 'A Streetcar Named Desire,' Milhouse takes on a Marlon Brando-inspired bad-boy persona to attract Lisa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fabulous Faker Boy
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side, and his initial resistance quickly subsides when Marge hires Slava’s beautiful daughter, Zhenya, as his new piano instructor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Saga of Carl Carlson
programme.desc: When Homer and his friends win $200,000 in the Springfield lottery, Carl takes off to Iceland with all the winnings.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangers on a Train
programme.desc: On a trip to 'Dizzneeland,' the Simpons board the wrong ride and are transported to Kang and Kodos' home planet.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerland
programme.desc: In a nod to the hit cable series 'Homeland,' Lisa suspects Homer may have been 'turned' when he returns a changed man from a nuclear power plant operating convention. So she enlists the services of the FBI.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIV
programme.desc: Homer rides around Springfield wreaking havoc as 'The Fat in The Hat' in a rhyming Dr. Seuss-ian tale. In 'Dead and Shoulders,' Bart is beheaded during a kite accident and his head is attached to Lisa's body.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Regrettings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Four Springfielders are prompted to try to right past regrets following the funeral of a beloved neighbour.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: I Bob Your Pardon
programme.desc: The Belchers set out to save a turkey from a trip to the slaughterhouse, but when a local reporter catches wind of their schemes, the mission becomes more complicated than they had anticipated.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: P.T.A It Ain't So
programme.desc: Linda attempts to become more involved with the P.T.A., inspired by its seemingly perfect president, Joanne. Meanwhile, Bob tries to cheer up a hardware store owner after unknowingly making a joke about his pet parrot that recently flew away.

programme.title: Family Guy: Married With Cancer
programme.desc: Brian meets and quickly falls in love with a woman named Jess, who reveals she has cancer. After she receives devastating news regarding her diagnosis, Brian proposes marriage to her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dead Dog Walking
programme.desc: Brian's marriage to Jess is not what he envisioned, especially after her miraculous recovery from cancer. At the suggestion of Peter, Brian lets himself go, causing Jess to make a surprising decision.

programme.desc: Archer helps defend a village from party crashers intent on ruining oysterfest.

programme.title: Archer: Archer Danger Island: A Discovery
programme.desc: Archer and the gang enter a deadly temple in search of an even deadlier treasure.

programme.title: Movie: The Fault in Our Stars

programme.title: Movie: The Greatest Showman

programme.title: Movie: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: A farmer has a long running feud with a rebellious rabbit named Peter who's determined to have free access to the man's delicious vegetable patch, but their feud reaches new heights when they both take a liking to an animal lover who lives nearby.

programme.title: Movie: The Godfather
programme.desc: A Mafia boss's innocent bookish son gets involved in the family business after a mob hit and becomes immersed in the world of organized crime.

programme.title: Movie: The Godfather II
programme.desc: Don Michael Corleone takes over and moves the family to Nevada, while flashbacks reveal his father's early days as an immigrant and a mobster in New York City.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Chris Hemsworth, Phoebe Waller-Bridge, Richard E. Grant, Joe Lycett are interviewed.

programme.title: Movie: The Godfather
programme.desc: A Mafia boss's innocent bookish son gets involved in the family business after a mob hit and becomes immersed in the world of organized crime.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Best of Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Revisit the most memorable scenes from Blue Planet II's seven episodes. Highlights include giant trevally that fly out of the water to snatch seabirds in mid-air and the industrious tuskfish who uses a coral anvil to crack open his clams.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Serengeti
programme.desc: Take a peek at one of the most famous habitats on Earth the Serengeti. This vast grassland is home to some of the greatest concentrations of herbivores in Africa.

programme.title: Planet Earth: One Amazing Day
programme.desc: The sun's journey across Earth's highest mountains and its most remote jungles in a single day is revealed.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Our Blue Planet
programme.desc: Explore parts of the ocean that have never been visited, encounter extraordinary animals and discover insights into life beneath the waves. Sir David Attenborough then examines the impact of human activity.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa Extended Stay: Troubled Waters
